exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited by Vrakas, S.C. (Brookfield, WI) — report dated March 6, 2025. Clean (unqualified) opinion. Three fiscal years: FY2024 ended 12/30/2024; FY2023 ended 12/25/2023; FY2022 ended 12/26/2022. Balance sheets, statements of operations + retained earnings, cash flows, and Notes 1-5 (accounting policies; cooperative advertising fund; location information; income taxes; related party transactions). Includes auditor consent letter.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Form Franchise Agreement, sections I-XXX: Grant of Franchise, Term/Renewal, Site Selection, Marks, Training, Advertising, Operations, etc. Referenced in Items 9 and 17.

exhibits.name: Franchise Deposit Agreement
exhibits.notes: Pre-FA deposit agreement. 180-day site-search window. Source of the 50-mile post-term noncompete variant noted in Item 17.

exhibits.name: Collateral Assignment of Lease
exhibits.notes: Optional lease assignment from franchisee to RFC as security.

exhibits.name: State Agency Information
exhibits.notes: List of state franchise administrators. No dedicated state addenda exhibit was identified in the TOC — state-law overrides appear inline in Item 17 markers.

missing_exhibits: No dedicated State Addenda exhibit in TOC despite registration in 14 states. State overrides, if present, embedded in ST or referenced inline in Item 17.
